case_title: FGR MV PINE, LLC VS. QUI TRUONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FGR MV PINE, LLC DBA THE PINNACLE AT NOB HILL SERVED NOV-15-2017, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
